parsed_output.justification: The transcript shows several accusing remarks only from Mike, who repeatedly declares that someone else is a werewolf and mentions switching cards. Other players rarely speak about being a werewolf. His statements – including “I think you’re the werewolf” (line 49) – suggest he is claiming misdirection characteristic of a werewolf. Therefore Mike is the most plausible suspect.
